title: Steampunk Air Conditioning Unit
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
I made a mistake in the video I said it moves 8 Litres - it moves 18 Litres per stroke - now i know I am going to get a load of comments telling me I got the math wrong and my plan is to direct you here - so please read this first - it would be awesome if you did lol
